The README contains 10 mermaid code blocks in total.
Required critical-flow headings are present: Borrow Call Flow, Contract Dependency Graph, Governance Lifecycle, and Dual-VM Execution Boundary.

assertionResults.title: README + SPEC + STATUS word count reduced at least 50% from pre-milestone baseline
observations: Using the parent of the first milestone commit (6adc392) as the pre-milestone baseline, README.md + dualvm/SPEC.md + STATUS.md totaled 2661 words.
Current repository state totals 2897 words across README.md (2775), dualvm/SPEC.md (122), and STATUS.md (deleted => 0).
Current docs are 236 words larger than the pre-milestone baseline, which is an 8.87% increase rather than a 50% reduction.
The intermediate radical-cut commit be2ba05 did reduce the total to 2433 words, but subsequent milestone additions regressed the total above the baseline by HEAD.
assertionResults.issues: Current HEAD does not satisfy the validation-contract requirement for a 50% reduction versus the honest pre-milestone baseline.
